heading: Sensitive Information
body:
Don't provide sensitive information such as Personally Identifiable
Information (PII) or Protected Health Information (PHI) for the
following items:

- [Create an Atlas organization](create-organization)

- [create a project](create-project)

- [cluster names](create-new-cluster-procedure)

- [database names](atlas-ui-create-a-db)

- [collection names](atlas-ui-create-a-collection)

- [custom tags](configure-resource-tags)
